text.title: Reflexion Learning Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Reflexion Learning end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: score-attempt
step.action: Run validator / test runner; capture pass/fail + diagnostics.

step.name: write-episode
step.action: Author episode JSON conforming to the schema.

step.name: persist
step.action: Append to memory store; assign attempt_id.

step.name: inject-on-next-run
step.action: Pull open corrective_rules into next attempt's system prompt.
